title: RMU Combat Storyboard
description: A module that logs combat events and then provides the GM with a wizard to generate a prompt for an AI LLM to create a cinematic comic-style script of the combat and then generate the comic book illustrations. The module optimises the combat log for the LLM by removing redundant information and formatting it in a way that is easy for the LLM to understand. The module provides a user interface for the GM to select which combat events to include in the prompt and to customise the prompt before sending it to the LLM.
